prompt:
Luxury feminine skincare advertisement, vertical 9:16 composition, ultra-realistic studio beauty product shot with dreamy soft focus and warm golden morning sunlight. Center a single elegant pump bottle serum in the foreground on a fluffy lavender-purple faux fur surface. The bottle is translucent pastel lavender glass with a shiny metallic gold pump and collar, premium glossy reflections, soft shadows, and subtle sparkle in the liquid. The front label reads {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"} in gold serif lettering, with smaller text below reading {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE ELIXIR"}, then “NOURISH • HYDRATE • GLOW” and “FOR SOFT, SMOOTH & GLOWING SKIN,” plus tiny size text at the bottom. Surround the bottle with a luxurious vanity setup: an ornate vintage mirror in the background, 1 ribbed glass candle jar with a lit flame on the lower left, 1 faceted glass perfume bottle with a gold neck on the right, strings of cream pearls draped across the surface, and airy white baby’s breath flowers framing both sides and the lower right foreground. Use a soft beige and blush background with creamy bokeh and a cozy high-end beauty branding mood.

Add cute white and purple hand-drawn doodle elements: exactly 3 heart doodles, 2 sparkle/star doodles, 1 small zigzag doodle, 1 curved arrow pointing toward the bottle, and 2 short accent line clusters above the headline. Add exactly 4 handwritten paper-note stickers with torn edges and taped scrapbook styling: left note says “Self care ♡ Everyday”, upper-right note says “For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin.♡”, lower-right note says “Radiant Confident You ♡”, and a purple heart-shaped sticker near the candle says “Glow is my favorite color ♡”. Place large hand-lettered headline text across the upper half reading {argument name="headline text" default="Glowy Skin In A Bottle"} in white brush-script with a soft lavender outline or glow. Beneath it, place a horizontal lavender paint-stroke banner with the subheading {argument name="tagline text" default="Nourish • Hydrate • Glow"} in white handwritten lettering. Clean composition, premium soft feminine branding, Instagram/TikTok-friendly viral beauty ad style, polished editorial product photography, pastel purple and gold color palette, cozy glamorous atmosphere.
translatedPrompt:
奢华女性护肤品广告，9:16 竖屏构图，超写实摄影棚美妆产品特写，带有梦幻般的柔焦效果和温暖的金色晨光。画面中央前景处放置一瓶优雅的按压式精华液，置于蓬松的薰衣草紫人造毛皮表面上。瓶身为半透明淡紫色玻璃材质，配有闪亮的金属金泵头和瓶颈，具有高级的光泽反射、柔和的阴影以及液体中细微的闪光。正面标签上用金色衬线字体印有 {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÈRE"}，下方较小的文字为 {argument name="product name" default="RADIANCE ELIXIR"}，接着是“NOURISH • HYDRATE • GLOW”和“FOR SOFT, SMOOTH & GLOWING SKIN”，底部还有极小的规格文字。瓶身周围环绕着奢华的梳妆台布置：背景是一个华丽的复古镜子，左下方有一个点燃的罗纹玻璃蜡烛罐，右侧有一个带金颈的切面玻璃香水瓶，表面铺着一串奶油色珍珠，两侧及右下角前景点缀着轻盈的白色满天星。背景采用柔和的米色和腮红粉色，带有奶油般的虚化效果，营造出舒适的高端美妆品牌氛围。

添加可爱的白色和紫色手绘涂鸦元素：正好 3 个心形涂鸦、2 个闪光/星星涂鸦、1 个小锯齿形涂鸦、1 个指向瓶身的弯曲箭头，以及标题上方 2 组短装饰线条。添加正好 4 个带有撕边效果和胶带剪贴簿风格的手写便签贴纸：左侧便签写着“Self care ♡ Everyday”，右上角便签写着“For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin.♡”，右下角便签写着“Radiant Confident You ♡”，蜡烛旁贴着一个紫色心形贴纸，写着“Glow is my favorite color ♡”。在上半部分放置醒目的大号手写标题文字 {argument name="headline text" default="Glowy Skin In A Bottle"}，采用白色笔刷字体，带有柔和的淡紫色轮廓或光晕。下方放置一个水平的淡紫色笔触横幅，上面写着副标题 {argument name="tagline text" default="Nourish • Hydrate • Glow"}，采用白色手写字体。构图简洁，具有高级柔美的品牌感，适合 Instagram/TikTok 的病毒式美妆广告风格，精致的编辑级产品摄影，淡紫色与金色配色方案，舒适而迷人的氛围。

breakdown.creativeCore: 奢华薰衣草护肤品广告：一款高级淡紫色护肤品广告，配有手写涂鸦覆盖层和梳妆台道具，非常适合美妆品牌推广及社交媒体视觉宣传。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, vintage, luxury, premium, hand-drawn, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
